claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented and ran the real Codex session knowledge promotion step. Added a reusable session:promote command that reads local Codex JSONL sessions, extracts repeated preferences/decisions/mistakes/rules via deterministic pattern aggregation, and writes public-safe paraphrased accepted memory plus review records without storing raw transcripts, message text, previews, or absolute local session paths. Ran it against 47 non-empty local Codex sessions / 4477 messages and promoted 15 accepted codex-session-knowledge memories plus a Codex Session Knowledge Profile and promotion reports. Rebuilt Wiki/SQLite indexes; wiki_search retrieves the promoted profile from sqlite_shards. Strengthened public-data safety to scan untracked sync candidates as well as tracked files; public-data safety reports degraded but blocker_count=0. App changes were committed and pushed as 5582bfe.
